---
name: Suggest an addition
about: New section, new starter piece, new prompt, new feature of Windsurf to cover
title: "[IDEA] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What should we add?

One paragraph. What's missing and why would adding it help readers?

## Category

- [ ] New prompt for `PROMPTS.md`
- [ ] New skill for `starter/.windsurf/skills/`
- [ ] New subagent for `starter/.windsurf/agents/`
- [ ] New hook for `starter/.windsurf/hooks/`
- [ ] New section in main `README.md`
- [ ] New benchmark workload in `bench/` + `BENCHMARKS.md`
- [ ] New MCP server in the curated list
- [ ] Other: `<specify>`

## Evidence this is valuable

- Link to a post / discussion where this came up
- Your own experience: "I hit this N times last week"
- Overlap with an existing pattern in Hermes / Claude Code / OpenClaw — link it

## Draft (optional)

If you have a first cut of the addition, paste it here. We'll iterate together in the PR.

## Would you contribute the PR?

- [ ] Yes, I'll send a PR
- [ ] Yes, if someone helps me get started
- [ ] I can't — just flagging it
